templates.name: blink-led
templates.description: Blink the built-in LED on an ESP32 using GPIO

templates.name: simple-api
templates.description: Minimal HTTP API with JSON endpoints

templates.name: fullstack
templates.description: Fullstack app: API backend + React/shadcn frontend

templates.name: wifi-sensing
templates.description: WiFi CSI sensing: ingests ESP32 CSI over UDP, derives presence/motion/breathing/heart rate (DSP), live React dashboard with CSI waterfall

templates.name: camera-feed
templates.description: Live camera feed: GStreamer MJPEG over WebSocket

templates.name: audio
templates.description: Live audio waveform visualization with mic capture

templates.name: voice-ai-pipecat
templates.description: Voice AI assistant: Pipecat + Gemini 2.5 Flash + local faster-whisper STT + Piper TTS

templates.name: llm
templates.description: Local LLM chat app: Ollama + Open WebUI as a compose app group

templates.name: camera-feed-yolo
templates.description: Live camera feed with YOLOv8 COCO object detection (generic CPU or Jetson GPU)

templates.name: realsense-camera
templates.description: Live RealSense D415 multi-stream viewer: color + 2x IR + depth as MJPEG

templates.name: go2-rc
templates.description: Remote-control the Unitree Go2 EDU from a browser: a 3-service app group (motion API + camera stream + teleop web UI)

templates.name: go2-initial-test
templates.description: Pre-hackathon hardware self-test for the Unitree Go2: one tiny app per hardware interface (camera, LiDAR, mic, speaker, IMU, foot contact, battery, motion, GPU, Bluetooth, cloud) plus a dashboard UI showing a live pass/fail go/no-go board

templates.name: go2-foxglove
templates.description: Stream a Unitree Go2 into Foxglove: LiDAR point cloud, pose+TF, body state and UWB over one WebSocket, plus the front camera (WebRTC). Ships a ready-made Foxglove layout.
